The forge has not been drawing right for weeks and nobody can figure out why
Someone brought in a piece of metalwork last week that had the whole workshop talking
The last batch of leather came in poorly cured and half the pieces had to be thrown out
A traveling tinker showed the apprentices a joining technique none of them had ever seen before
The kiln cracked during the last firing and it will take a full rebuild before anyone can use it again
The carpenter finished a set of joints so clean you cannot even see the seam where they meet
Nobody can get the alloy right since the usual ore supplier stopped sending shipments
The weaver produced a bolt of cloth so fine that a merchant offered three times the asking price on the spot
There is a commission sitting on the workbench that nobody in the shop has the skill to finish
The tools from the old master's workshop finally turned up and they are still sharper than anything we make now
Someone has been using the grinding wheel without cleaning it and the sparks nearly caught the rafters
The dye lot came out wrong and an entire run of fabric turned a color nobody ordered
